ShortDescription.Value: Per-building vehicle, storage, and delivery controls for signature factories.

Publish.LongDescription:
Take control of signature-factory logistics without changing ordinary zoned industry.
- Set global vehicle, storage, and input-restocking defaults. - Save separate vehicle and storage limits on individual signature factories. - Reset any factory to the global defaults at any time. - Keep required production inputs moving through normal local suppliers and imports. - See each active delivery vehicle's cargo and approximate distance to its destination.
The game still chooses real suppliers, charges normal costs, and requires a working delivery route.

ChangeLog.Value: Initial release: configurable global and per-building vehicle/storage limits, priority input restocking, and active delivery cargo/distance details.
